attributes.description: Overview of Codex security findings and scan-configuration activity in OpenAI ChatGPT Enterprise.

params.markdown:
#### OpenAI ChatGPT Enterprise

**Codex Security Logs**

This dashboard gives visibility into Codex security activity in OpenAI ChatGPT Enterprise, covering security findings and scan-configuration changes. It highlights total events, unique users and findings, activity over time, the breakdown of event actions, finding severity, and Codex clients, plus the most active users, finding statuses, scan types, and scanned repositories. Use the controls above to filter by event action, Codex client, and finding severity to support security monitoring, triage, and auditing.

**[Integration Page](/app/integrations/detail/openai_chatgpt_enterprise/overview)**
